form.formComment: Useful type. Freshened for 32 days. Last start finished ninth of 13 starters at Kempton Park on March 14 over 4200m, 16 len behind Intosomethinggood with 76kg at $11. Run before held ground to the line finished second of 9 runners at Kempton Park on February 21 over 4200m, 3.5 len behind Hold The Serve with 75.5kg at $11. Sure to improve again. Each-way chance.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 32 days. Last start favourite; won by 1.0 len Newcastle on March 14 over 3400m defeating Dartmouth Castle with 75.5kg at $1.80 in a hurdle.
